com.hp.workpath.api.job

Class ScanJobData

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.hp.workpath.api.job.ScanJobData
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    android.os.Parcelable, com.hp.workpath.api.Convertor, JobInfo.JobData

    public class ScanJobData
extends java.lang.Object
implements JobInfo.JobData, com.hp.workpath.api.Convertor

    Provides details of SCAN job.

    Since:
    API 1

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      ScanAttributes.Destination getDestination()
      Returns destination to be sent with scanned document
      ScanAttributes.Duplex getDuplex()
      Returns duplex mode of scan job
      java.util.List<java.lang.String> getFileNames()
      Returns the list of the scanned document name with absolute path
      int getImagesProcessed()
      Returns number of processed images
      int getImagesScanned()
      Returns counter of scanned images
      int getImagesTransmitted()
      Returns number of transmitted images
      ScanJobState getJobState()
      Returns the state of scan job.
      ScanAttributes.ScanSize getScanSize()
      Returns media size of scanned document
